company.name: AsesoriaOS
company.description: AI-native operating system for Spanish advisory firms, starting with fiscal and accounting workflows for autonomos and micro-SL companies.

agents.name: Alicia Founder
agents.title: CEO / Founder
agents.capabilities: Translate the company mission into concrete goals, staffing, priorities, and approval packages while keeping the wedge narrow and auditable.

agents.name: Bruno Platform
agents.title: CTO / Platform Architect
agents.capabilities: Own system boundaries, data and event contracts, security assumptions, and technical sequencing across product, AI, and integrations.

agents.name: Clara Product
agents.title: Product & UX Lead
agents.capabilities: Design operator workflows, client-facing simplicity, and explainable automation UX for non-technical advisory operators.

agents.name: Diego Fiscal
agents.title: Fiscal Domain Lead
agents.capabilities: Define fiscal and accounting workflow rules, automation boundaries, edge cases, and human-review points for autonomos and micro-SL companies.

agents.name: Elena Workflow
agents.title: AI Workflow Engineer
agents.capabilities: Turn advisory workflows into typed, reviewable, dry-run-first agent workflows with explicit handoffs and auditability.

agents.name: Fabio Audit
agents.title: QA & Audit Lead
agents.capabilities: Own golden datasets, release evidence, regression quality, and audit-readiness for risky fiscal and accounting flows.

goals.title: Deliver by June 3, 2026 a Spain-only MVP for advisory firms that automates document intake, accounting normalization, and VAT-support workflows for autonomos and micro-SL companies, with human review, end-to-end auditability, and a dual UI plus agent-native interface.
goals.description: The first release must be Spain-only, fiscal and accounting first, human-reviewed for regulated flows, and explainable to non-technical operators.

goals.title: Define the canonical API, workflow, and audit model
goals.description: A shared contract for board UI, operator UI, and agent-native automation.

goals.title: Make every automation understandable to a non-technical advisory operator
goals.description: Status, exceptions, confidence, and required actions must always be visible.

goals.title: Specify correct accounting and VAT-support workflows for autonomos and micro-SL
goals.description: Start with repeatable monthly and quarterly workflows, not payroll or mercantile expansion.

goals.title: Expose typed, dry-run-first actions for AI-native operation
goals.description: Agent actions must be explicit, typed, reviewable, and approval-aware.

goals.title: Require evidence bundles and replayable audit trails for risky flows
goals.description: Every risky workflow should have a deterministic audit trail and release gate evidence.

projects.name: operating-plan
projects.description: Strategy, staffing, sequencing, approval packages, and board-facing decision memos.

projects.name: platform-core
projects.description: API, tenancy, workflow state, event model, and audit architecture.

projects.name: operator-experience
projects.description: Operator and client-facing flows for intake, review, explanations, and exception handling.

projects.name: fiscal-domain-model
projects.description: Accounting normalization rules, VAT logic, obligations, and exception handling.

projects.name: agent-action-layer
projects.description: Typed tools, dry-run semantics, approval handoffs, and explainable action execution.

projects.name: quality-audit
projects.description: Golden datasets, release gates, audit bundles, and regression evidence.

issues.title: Approve 90-day operating plan and budget split
issues.description: Produce the CEO operating memo for March 5, 2026 through June 3, 2026, including budget split, phase 1 focus, phase 2 hires, risks, and board approval asks. This issue exists to anchor the initial approve_ceo_strategy request.

issues.title: Define canonical platform architecture for AsesoriaOS
issues.description: Specify the entity, event, workflow, audit, and action architecture for the Spain-first advisory product. Keep multi-tenant isolation strict and design the API first for humans and agents.

issues.title: Define fiscal operating model for autonomos and micro-SL
issues.description: Describe the document-to-ledger and VAT-support workflows for the first wedge, including edge cases, exception handling, and human review checkpoints.

issues.title: Specify typed agent action layer with dry-run semantics
issues.description: Define read, simulate, propose, and commit tool classes with typed inputs and outputs, approval semantics, rollback expectations, and audit fields.

issues.title: Define QA baseline, golden datasets, and evidence bundle standard
issues.description: Create the release gates, test corpus, golden datasets, audit bundle checklist, and sign-off policy for risky fiscal and accounting workflows.

issues.title: Specify operator workspace and human-review cockpit v1
issues.description: Design the operator-facing information architecture, review states, confidence surfaces, explanations, and exception handling flows for non-technical advisory staff.

issues.title: Specify client intake and document classification flow
issues.description: Define the document upload, OCR review, evidence visibility, and exception routing flow that clients and operators will use before any accounting normalization occurs.

issues.title: Define MVP data contracts for clients, obligations, evidence bundles, and workflow runs
issues.description: Create the shared data contracts for client accounts, obligations, evidence bundles, workflow runs, and approval-aware action requests.

issues.title: Define VAT-support workflow for quarterly and monthly periods
issues.description: Specify obligations, checkpoints, exception catalog, and expected outputs for the VAT-support workflow across monthly and quarterly reporting periods.

issues.title: Prototype explainable action requests and approval UX
issues.description: Design the diff views, refusal behavior, approval payloads, and operator explanations for regulated or high-risk action requests.

issues.title: Define regulatory control matrix for fiscal-impacting logic
issues.description: Prepare the control matrix for logic changes that affect fiscal outcomes, retention, privacy, and live side effects. This issue is intentionally blocked until the compliance lead is hired.

issues.title: Define AEAT/TGSS/banking/signature mock-first integration matrix
issues.description: Document the read-only and side-effecting capabilities, authentication assumptions, mock strategy, and risk controls for AEAT, TGSS, banking, and signature connectors. Blocked until the integrations lead is hired.

issues.title: Prepare pilot ICP and interview package for Spanish advisory firms
issues.description: Define the pilot ICP, interview guide, qualification rubric, and operator language feedback loop for Spanish advisory firms. Blocked until the discovery lead is hired.

payload.companyGoal: Deliver June 3, 2026 MVP for Spanish advisory firms
